text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Our hearts are one the same! ♪ We'll run to our
goals, and nothing's gonna get in our way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(The hook is coming! Okay, time to breathe in
through the nose and belt it out as loud as I can!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Together we'll run for our dre—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! My time's up already?
Do I want to extend my stay? No, thank you. I
have a curfew to keep...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh! I didn't get to sing the best part of the
song!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A heavy sense of disappointment and
unfulfillment dampens Kitasan Black's mood after
she gets cut off right before the chorus.
